title: masdevallia dalstroemii
intro: Masdevallia dalstroemii, also known as Dalstroemia, is a type of orchid native to the tropical regions of South America. It is a species of epiphytic orchid, which is a plant that grows on other plants for support, often on trees in its natural habitat. The medicinal properties of Masdevallia dalstroemii include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The herbal preparations of Masdevallia dalstroemii are traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, coughs, and digestive problems, and may be prepared as a tea or infusion.
